column2: Analytic but Simple (Explains 'why' but uses simple language)
column3: Casual (Texting style: lowercase, no punctuation, slang like 'tbh', 'idk', 'tho', fragments)
column4: Confused Student (Unsure about things, asks rhetorical questions)
column5: Rant/Rave (Emotional, very subjective, lots of punctuation !!! or ...)
column7: Simple & Direct (Use only common words. No academic jargon. Like talking to a friend)
